pr.title: Audit report: UX/UI findings across SQLite, Postgres, and DuckDB playgrounds
pr.body:
Audits the three SQL playgrounds end-to-end and delivers a categorized findings report with severities, file-level citations, and a prioritized fix list. Live walkthrough was done against `/playground/postgres` (PGlite bundles locally); SQLite and DuckDB were audited via source since their WASM modules failed to load in the sandbox â€” which itself surfaced the first finding.

### Deliverables
- `agent-outputs/20260524-0058-sql-playgrounds-ux-audit.md` â€” full report
- `agent-outputs/assets-20260524-sql-playground-audit/*.png` â€” 4 supporting screenshots

### Report structure
- Executive summary + severity legend
- 27-row top-findings table with `file:line` citations
- Cross-playground consistency matrix
- Per-workflow sections: engine boot, create table, inline cell editing, drop/truncate, triggers/indexes/views, constraints, errors, schemas/workspaces, import/export, notifications/history/undo, a11y, responsiveness
- 3-tier prioritized recommendations (10 quick wins / 13 medium / 7 larger)
- Methodology + environment appendix

### Headline findings
- đŸ”´ **F-02** Shared `ResultView.tsx:890` hard-codes `"Loading SQLite engineâ€¦"` â€” leaks into Postgres and DuckDB pages
- đŸ”´ **F-01** Engine-load failure has no retry; tiny error caption hidden under giant title-stamp loader; Import/Export silently disabled with no tooltip
- đŸ”´ **F-03 / F-25** Postgres `dropEntity` silently issues `CASCADE` (`runtime/postgres.ts:695`); DuckDB does not â€” same button, divergent destruction; truncate similarly hides `RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE`
- đŸ”´ **F-05** Add-Table type combobox filters its own listbox by current text, so opening the chevron on the default `bigserial` shows only `bigserial` of 30+ available types
- đŸ”´ **F-04 / F-08** Every cell (JSON, JSONB, BYTEA, TIMESTAMPTZ, UUID, arrays, STRUCT) edits through one plain `<input type="text">`; commits require a separate, undiscoverable button; no in-session undo
- đŸ”´ **F-06** Multi-statement errors drop partial results and never identify which statement failed; editor line/column is never highlighted; error overlay auto-dismisses after ~3s
- đŸ”´ **F-07** No query cancellation, timeout, or elapsed-time indicator
- đŸŸ¡ **F-09** Sidebar lists triggers/indexes/views with rich icons but only supports View-DDL and Drop â€” no create/edit anywhere
- đŸŸ¡ **F-14** Import/export parity is broken: SQLite has CSV/JSON/Parquet/XLSX/.db; Postgres only `.sql`; DuckDB has no CSV-import dialog despite native `read_csv()`
- đŸŸ¡ **F-12 / F-13** Escape doesn't reliably close the Add-Table modal; the 13-column structure table has no responsive collapse
- đŸŸ¡ **F-10 / F-17** Toast timeout 2.4s (too short for errors); query history is in-memory only
- đŸŸ¡ **F-18 / F-19** Workspace-conflict warning is a non-blocking toast; schema switch leaves open tabs silently pointed at the previous schema
- â™¿ **F-21 / F-24** Inline edit input has no `aria-label`; NULL / pending-edit cues are color-only; DuckDB's "Open type list" trigger is missing an `aria-label` that Postgres has
- **F-27** Google Fonts is fetched cross-origin; when blocked, `document.fonts.ready` never resolves (also broke Playwright screenshots during the audit)

### Suggested next steps
Tier-0 fixes (â‰¤1 day each) cluster around the shared `SqlPlayground` / `SqlPlaygroundShell` / `ResultView` components, so most quick wins are single-file edits. The two parallel Add-Table implementations (custom in `PostgresPlayground.tsx` and `DuckDbPlayground.tsx`) are the root cause of the F-04 / F-05 / F-15 / F-16 inconsistencies and are good candidates for consolidation onto a shared form driven by per-engine type catalogs.
pr.author: Copilot
